note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- `random_word_id` implementation: `vendor/baml/crates/bstd/src/random_word_id.rs` (re-exported in `vendor/baml/crates/bstd/src/lib.rs`).
- No usages found under `crates/` via `rg -n "random_word_id" crates`.
Investigation: confirm whether any dependency pulls `bstd` into the public API (check `Cargo.toml`/`Cargo.lock`), and decide if we should re-export, vendor, or remove.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- Template entry points: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs` `format_system_message_typed_with_instruction`, `format_user_message_typed`, `format_demo_typed`.
- Jinja env: `crate::baml_bridge::jsonish::jinja_helpers::get_env()` used in `render_template`/`render_template_with_ws`.
- Context building: `build_template_context_base`, `add_template_inputs`, `add_template_outputs` in `adapter/chat.rs`.
- Default templates: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/templates.rs` (system/user/assistant).
- Field helpers: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/jinja_types.rs` exposes `JinjaField` + `JinjaBamlValue` with `.render()`.
- Signature hooks: `core/signature.rs` already exposes `system_template` and `user_template` for per-signature overrides.
Likely missing for "full" templating: allow instruction text to be a Jinja template rendered with the input ctx, plus demo/assistant template override hooks (mirroring system/user hooks).
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: Recreate crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_type.rs and update crates/rlm-derive/src/lib.rs to call it (see dsrs-vn6.1.10 plan). This was removed when jj abandon cleared the working copy.

note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- `FieldSpec.format` + `FieldSpec.render` live in `crates/dspy-rs/src/core/signature.rs`.
- Input formatting path: `adapter/chat.rs` -> `add_template_inputs` wraps each input as `JinjaBamlValue` and uses `JinjaField::render`.
- Actual formatter: `adapter/jinja_types.rs` `format_baml_value_default` calls `baml_bridge::internal_baml_jinja::format_baml_value` (json/yaml/toon).
- Tests already cover formats in `crates/dspy-rs/tests/test_input_format.rs` (yaml/json/toon + default).
Potential missing: ensure derive macro (`crates/dsrs-macros/src/lib.rs`) wires `#[format("...")]`/`#[render("...")]` onto `FieldSpec` for inputs in all paths.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Edge case decisions:
- Tie-breaker: if scores tie, pick first branch in union declaration order
- Recursive aliases: resolve via world.types before scoring
- Empty class (no fields): score 0 (matches nothing)
- All-optional class with no fields present in value: score 0
- Null value: matches null branch if present, else Ambiguous
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
This bead implements resolved_ty() which is used by:
- dsrs-n9u.19 (get_value): Needed to determine if union is resolved before allowing field access
- dsrs-n9u.27 (structural fallback): Renders resolved type vs 'one of: A | B' for ambiguous
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: Display impl should be a stub/placeholder until dsrs-n9u.24 installs the custom formatter that routes through render_prompt_value. The code sample shows the final form, not the initial stub.

note.content: Display impl should be a stub initially (just write '<PromptValue>') - the code sample in description shows the FINAL form after dsrs-n9u.24 wires the custom formatter. Don't try to call render_prompt_value until .24 is done.

note.content: Prerequisite: Add minijinja to baml-bridge-derive/Cargo.toml for compile-time template syntax validation. Use same git source as baml-bridge.

note.content: FieldSpec shape changes required - add these fields to generation: style: Option<&'static str>, renderer: Option<FieldRendererSpec>, render_settings: Option<FieldRenderSettings>. See plan section 10 for full spec.

note.content: NOTE: Currently signature is at core/signature.rs (single file), not a module directory. Options: (a) create crates/dspy-rs/src/signature/ directory and move/re-export, or (b) put compiled.rs in core/ alongside signature.rs. Recommend option (b) for minimal churn.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: Create crates/dspy-rs/src/core/signature/ as a submodule directory. Move existing core/signature.rs content to core/signature/mod.rs, then add compiled.rs alongside it. Update core/mod.rs to use 'mod signature' (directory) instead of single file.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: Modern Rust style: Keep core/signature.rs as module root. Create core/signature/ directory and add compiled.rs inside it. In signature.rs add 'mod compiled; pub use compiled::*;' to expose CompiledSignature. No mod.rs needed.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: Match existing codebase pattern (see core/lm/): Create core/signature/ directory with mod.rs (move existing signature.rs content there) and compiled.rs. Update core/mod.rs to keep 'pub mod signature;' - it will now resolve to the directory.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content: May require updating Adapter trait in adapter/mod.rs if format methods need to return Result instead of String. Check trait definition and all implementors.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- Typed path: `crates/dspy-rs/src/predictors/predict.rs` `Predict::call_with_meta` builds ChatAdapter messages, then calls `lm.call` directly; no cache lookup/insert.
- Legacy cache path: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs` `ChatAdapter::call` uses `lm.cache` + `cache_handler` with `CacheEntry` (see `crates/dspy-rs/src/utils/cache.rs`).
- Cache key today is `Example` (input fields only); it ignores instruction_override, demos, lm model/params, or signature name.
Suggested insertion points: before `lm.call` in `Predict::call_with_meta` for lookup, and after parse for insert; or move caching to `LM::call` in `crates/dspy-rs/src/core/lm/mod.rs` so both typed and legacy share it.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan anchor: `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md` (Typed RLM with DSRs Integration). Phases 1–7 cover rlm-derive/rlm-core, Signature integration, SUBMIT bridge, TypedRlm loop, prompt generation, integration/examples, and tests.
Key crates/files referenced across phases:
- `crates/rlm-derive/*` (macros, pyclass + helpers)
- `crates/rlm-core/*` (RlmDescribe, RlmVariable, RlmInputFields)
- `crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs` + feature-gated pyo3
- `crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs`, `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/*` (TypedRlm, adapters)
Acceptance is summarized in phase acceptance beads (vn6.1.11–vn6.7.8).
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 1 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): build `rlm-derive` + `rlm-core`, add `#[rlm_type]` attribute + `#[derive(RlmType)]`, generate PyO3 getters/dunder methods, filter/flatten properties, __baml__ conversion, and `__rlm_schema__` metadata.
Key files: `crates/rlm-derive/src/lib.rs`, `attrs.rs`, `rlm_attr.rs`, `rlm_type.rs`, `generators/*` (pyclass, repr, iter, properties, describe, schema). Workspace `Cargo.toml` adds crate.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.1.11`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md Task 1.1): scaffold `crates/rlm-derive` as proc-macro crate.
Files to create:
- `crates/rlm-derive/Cargo.toml` (proc-macro=true; deps: proc-macro2, quote, syn(full/parsing/extra-traits), darling)
- `crates/rlm-derive/src/lib.rs` exporting `#[rlm_type]` attribute macro + `#[derive(RlmType)]`
- `crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_attr.rs` for struct rewriting
Workspace: add `crates/rlm-derive` (and `crates/rlm-core`) to top-level `Cargo.toml` members.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.9): wire main derive entry point in `crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_type.rs`.
- Parse `RlmTypeAttrs` via darling.
- Emit pyclass impl (`generate_pyclass`) + `RlmDescribe` impl (`generate_describe`).
- Update `generators/mod.rs` to export only needed modules.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan acceptance (Phase 1 in `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- `#[rlm_type]` compiles and is usable from Python: getters + `repr` + optional `__len__/__iter__/__getitem__` work per attrs.
- `#[derive(RlmType)]` without `#[pyclass]` should error clearly; with `#[pyclass]` compiles.
- `__baml__()` returns JSON-like Python object consistent with `BamlType::to_baml_value`; round-trips via `try_from_baml_value`.
- `__rlm_schema__()` returns dict of field type + description (and constraints where available).
- filter/flatten properties produce correct values.
- `RlmDescribe` output is stable.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.2): add attribute parsing via darling in `crates/rlm-derive/src/attrs.rs`.
Key structs:
- `RlmTypeAttrs` (`#[rlm(...)]` on struct): repr template, iter/index fields, pyclass_name, properties.
- `RlmFieldAttrs` (`#[rlm(...)]` on fields): desc, filter_property/value/field, flatten_property/parent, skip_python, skip_schema.
Includes helper `fields()` to iterate named fields.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.3): add `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/*` with PyO3 codegen.
- `generators/mod.rs` exports `pyclass`, `repr`, `iter`, `properties`, `describe`, `schema`.
- `generators/pyclass.rs` emits `#[pymethods]` with getters, __baml__ (via `baml_bridge::ToBamlValue` + `baml_bridge::py::baml_value_to_py`), and wires repr/iter/properties/schema generators.
Getter logic: return Copy by value, String as &str, otherwise clone; skip fields with `skip_python`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.4): implement `__repr__` generation in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/repr.rs`.
Supports template interpolation:
- `{self.field}`
- `{self.field:N}` truncation
- `{len(self.field)}`
Fallback auto-repr uses first field or struct name with preview.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.5): `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/iter.rs` generates `__len__`, `__getitem__`, and `__iter__` based on `#[rlm(iter=..., index=...)]`.
- `__len__` uses iter field length.
- `__getitem__` supports negative indices and raises `PyIndexError` if OOB; clones items.
- `__iter__` generates a private `__<Struct>Iter` pyclass with `__next__`.
Helper extracts `Vec<T>` inner type.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.6): implement filter/flatten property generators in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/properties.rs`.
- Filter: `filter_property`, `filter_value`, `filter_field` on a field emits method returning filtered Vec.
- Flatten: `flatten_property` (+ optional `flatten_parent`) flattens nested Vec/Option<Vec>.
Helpers to detect Option/Vec and innermost Vec type.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- Typed metadata builder: `crates/dspy-rs/src/predictors/predict.rs` `field_specs_to_value` builds a per-field dict; currently sets `schema` to empty string and adds `__dsrs_field_type`.
- Legacy macros in `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs` `field!` generate schema using `schemars` and fill `schema` + `__dsrs_field_type`.
- Prompt side consumes schema in `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs` (schema hints for output fields).
Potential implementation: `__rlm_schema__` could expose `FieldSpec` info + rendered schema (via `OutputFormatContent::render` or `TypeIR::diagnostic_repr`) and attach to the generated pyclass in the future `rlm-derive` crate.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.6b in dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md): generate `__rlm_schema__` for REPL discovery.
Files: `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/schema.rs` + wire into `generators/pyclass.rs`.
`__rlm_schema__` returns `PyDict` keyed by field name with `(type, desc)` (extend with constraints if available). Optional: field docstrings if PyO3 supports them.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.7): stop custom BamlType codegen; use `baml-bridge-derive`.
- Remove any `baml` generator module.
- `#[rlm_type]` injects `#[derive(baml_bridge::BamlType, RlmType)]`.
- `rlm_type.rs` should only emit pyclass + describe impls (no BamlType impls).
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 1.8): implement `RlmDescribe` generation in `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/describe.rs`.
Generates static `RlmFieldDesc`/`RlmPropertyDesc` arrays, type name, `describe_value()` preview (list length, string truncation), plus flags for iterable/indexable based on attrs.
Used later by `RlmVariable` + prompt generation.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 2 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): add `rlm-core` traits (RlmDescribe, RlmVariable, RlmInputFields) and wire Signature derive to expose input fields to Python REPL + prompt builder. Also add feature‑gated Python↔BamlValue helpers in `baml-bridge` and `dspy-rs`.
Key files: `crates/rlm-core/src/describe.rs`, `variable.rs`, `input.rs`, `lib.rs`; `crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs` + Cargo feature `pyo3`; `crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs`; `crates/dsrs-macros/src/lib.rs` for `RlmInputFields` impl on `<Sig>Input`.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.2.5`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 2.1): create `crates/rlm-core` with traits in `describe.rs` + exports in `lib.rs`.
- `RlmDescribe`, `RlmFieldDesc`, `RlmPropertyDesc`, `RlmTypeInfo`.
- Include container impls for `Vec<T>` and `Option<T>` to improve prompt descriptions.
Cargo.toml: depends on pyo3 (auto-init) + baml-bridge.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 2.2): add variable description helper in `crates/rlm-core/src/variable.rs`.
- `RlmVariable { name, type_desc, description, constraints, total_length, preview, properties }`.
- `RlmVariable::from_rust<T: RlmDescribe>` computes type/preview and property list.
- `format()` renders prompt-ready block including constraints + preview.
Update `rlm-core/src/lib.rs` to export `RlmVariable`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 2.3): add `RlmInputFields` in `crates/rlm-core/src/input.rs` and auto-implement for `<Sig>Input` via `dsrs-macros` when feature `rlm` is enabled.
- `rlm_py_fields(py)` returns `(name, Py<PyAny>)` for each input.
- `rlm_variables()` builds `RlmVariable` list using `RlmDescribe` + field metadata (desc/constraints).
- `inject_into_python(py, globals)` sets globals for REPL.
Wire exports in `rlm-core/src/lib.rs`, add `rlm` feature deps in `crates/dsrs-macros/Cargo.toml` + `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml`, and re-export in `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 2.4): add feature‑gated Python conversion helpers in baml-bridge + dspy-rs.
- `crates/baml-bridge/Cargo.toml`: feature `pyo3 = [dep:pyo3]`.
- `crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs`: `baml_value_to_py`, `py_to_baml_value` (schema-guided), normalization helpers + optional orjson fallback.
- `crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs`: Signature-aware helpers (`kwargs_to_baml_value`, `missing_output_fields`, `collect_checks_for_output`).
- `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml` feature `rlm = [rlm-core, rlm-derive, pyo3, baml-bridge/pyo3]` and optional re-export in `lib.rs`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 2 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- `rlm-core` crate exists with `RlmDescribe`, `RlmVariable`, `RlmInputFields` traits exported.
- `RlmVariable::format()` produces prompt-ready variable blocks.
- `RlmInputFields` auto-generated for `<Sig>Input` (feature `rlm`), exposing `rlm_py_fields` + `rlm_variables` + `inject_into_python`.
- `baml-bridge` has feature-gated `py` module (`baml_value_to_py`, `py_to_baml_value` + normalization helpers).
- `dspy-rs` wires `rlm` feature to enable pyo3 + re-export `py` helpers.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 3 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): implement SUBMIT bridge + helpers for parsing Python kwargs into BamlValue, validating constraints, and formatting errors/schema for prompts.
Expected files (per plan): `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/submit.rs` or `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/submit/mod.rs` with `SubmitHandler`; helper functions for `format_parse_errors`, `generate_schema_description`, and `build_field_metas` (Phase 3 tasks). Uses `baml_bridge::py::py_to_baml_value` + jsonish for coercion, then `run_user_checks` for constraints.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.3.4`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 3.1): create SUBMIT module (example path in plan: `src/submit.rs` for rlm module).
- Define `SubmitHandler` pyclass with `__call__(**kwargs)` for validation.
- Uses `dspy_rs::py::kwargs_to_baml_value::<S>` + `collect_checks_for_output::<S>`.
- Returns DSPy-like success/warn/error strings; stores result via shared channel/Mutex.
- Defines `SubmitResult`/`SubmitError` enums for Rust side.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 3.2): implement `build_field_metas` helper (inside SUBMIT module).
- Takes parsed `BamlValue` + checks/flags, populates `FieldMeta { raw_text, flags, checks }`.
- In plan, baml_bridge checks are not field-scoped, so store under `_root` key initially.
- Converts `ResponseCheck` into `ConstraintResult` with passed boolean.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 3.3): implement `format_parse_errors` + `generate_schema_description` helpers for SUBMIT.
- `format_parse_errors(BamlParseError)` returns DSPy-style strings for missing fields, type coercion, or asserts.
- `generate_schema_description<S: Signature>()` renders expected SUBMIT signature + field types/constraints (uses `FieldSpec` and `ConstraintKind`).
Used to produce error text and `SubmitHandler::schema()` output.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 3 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- SUBMIT handler accepts Python kwargs, converts via `baml_bridge::py::py_to_baml_value`, validates via `run_user_checks`, and returns typed output or structured errors.
- `format_parse_errors` + `generate_schema_description` produce clear DSPy-like error strings.
- `build_field_metas` collects per-field raw text/flags/checks for meta.
- Error messages include missing fields + coercion failures with field names.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 4 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): TypedRlm core + REPL loop. Includes `RlmConfig`/`RlmResult`, `TypedRlm` struct + constructors, `TypedRlm::call` main loop, Jupyter-style output semantics, extraction fallback, LlmTools module, and Command parser for REPL.
Likely files: `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/mod.rs`, `typed_rlm.rs`, `config.rs`, `result.rs`, `repl/command.rs`, `tools.rs` (final locations may vary; align with plan). Uses `RlmInputFields` for Python variable injection and SUBMIT handler for tool calls.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.4.8`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): `RlmConfig` + `RlmResult` live in `src/typed_rlm.rs` (see Task 4.1 in dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md).
- `RlmConfig` defaults: max_iterations=20, max_llm_calls=50, enable_extraction_fallback=true, strict_assertions=true, max_output_chars=100k, max_history_output_chars=5k.
- `RlmResult` stores input/output, field_metas, iterations, llm_calls, extraction_fallback, constraint summary; `to_signature()` reconstructs full signature.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): `TypedRlm<S>` struct + constructors in `src/typed_rlm.rs`.
- Fields: `agent: Agent<CompletionModel>`, `config: RlmConfig`, `PhantomData<S>`.
- Constructors: `new(agent, config)` + `with_agent(agent)`.
Trait bounds on `call`: `S: Signature + Clone + 'static`, `S::Input: ToBamlValue + RlmInputFields + Clone + Send + Sync`, `S::Output: BamlType + Clone`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): `TypedRlm::call` main loop in `src/typed_rlm.rs`.
- Builds `LlmTools` with call limit.
- Creates `SubmitHandler::new::<S>()` and preamble (`generate_typed_preamble::<S>`).
- REPL loop: prompt → agent.prompt → parse `Command` → run Python code with Jupyter semantics → handle SUBMIT result or continue.
- On max_iterations: extraction_fallback or error.
- On SUBMIT success: convert `BamlValue` to `S::Output` and return `RlmResult`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): Jupyter-style output semantics inside `TypedRlm::call`.
- Execute all statements; if last statement is expression (no trailing `;`), evaluate and append repr.
- Combine stdout first, then repr of last expression.
- If empty: show "(no output - did you forget to print?)".
- Truncate at `max_output_chars`, then later history truncation uses DSPy marker at `max_history_output_chars`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): extraction fallback in `TypedRlm::extraction_fallback`.
- Build summary from message_history, include output schema.
- Prompt LLM to output JSON matching schema; parse via `ChatAdapter::parse_response_typed::<S>`.
- Return `RlmResult` with `extraction_fallback=true` and constraint summary.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): add `LlmTools` module (likely `src/tools.rs`).
- Wraps agent to provide `llm_query` / `llm_query_batched` callable from REPL.
- Enforce `max_llm_calls` with DSPy‑exact RuntimeError message.
- Expose to Python globals in `TypedRlm::call` via `_llm_tools`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Phase 4): REPL Command parser (likely `src/repl/command.rs`).
- Parse model output for ```repl``` code blocks and/or SUBMIT calls.
- Expose helpers like `get_code_to_run()` / `get_run_command()` to drive execution.
- Strip code fences with DSPy regex before execution; preserve for history formatting.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 4 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- `RlmConfig` + `RlmResult` structs exist and are used by `TypedRlm`.
- `TypedRlm::call` runs REPL loop, handles SUBMIT + tool calls, respects Jupyter-style output semantics.
- Command parser handles REPL commands (e.g., SUBMIT) and returns structured errors.
- Extraction fallback implemented for non-SUBMIT responses.
- `LlmTools` module wired for tool call handling.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 5 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): prompt generation for RLM. Tasks include parity requirements, preamble generator, output schema description, BAML-style shape formatter, REPL history formatter, and RlmAdapter module.
Likely files: `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/prompt/*` (preamble, schema/shape formatter), `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/rlm_adapter.rs` (or similar). Reuse `OutputFormatContent` + `TypeIR` rendering rules (depth/field limits) from plan.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.5.7`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.0): capture DSPy prompt parity + introduce `RlmAdapter`.
- Use DSPy `ACTION_INSTRUCTIONS_TEMPLATE` wording (incl. "MINIMIZE RETYPING (INPUTS & OUTPUTS)").
- Inputs = backticked variable names; output_fields list includes name/type/desc/constraints.
- Use `RlmVariable::format()` for variable previews.
- Add `RlmAdapter` (feature-gated) rather than modifying ChatAdapter; responsible for system prompt + RLM formatting.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.1): create preamble generator (`src/preamble.rs`).
- `generate_typed_preamble<S: Signature>(variable_descriptions: &str) -> String`.
- Combines instruction text, output schema description, and variable description blocks into DSPy-parity preamble.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.2): output schema description helper.
- Build from `S::output_fields()` with `(field.type_ir)()` to display type names.
- Include field descriptions and constraints (check/assert) in rendered schema block.
- Reused by preamble generator + SUBMIT schema display.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.3): BAML-style shape formatter using `OutputFormatContent` + `TypeIR`.
Rules: depth=3, max_fields=20; if >20 fields append `... (+N more)`; if depth exhausted render `TypeName { ... }`; use visited set for cycles; deterministic field order.
Likely location: `src/rlm/prompt/shape.rs` or similar, then used in `RlmAdapter`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.4): REPL history formatter.
- Format message_history into DSPy-like blocks; strip code fences before execution and re-add for history.
- Apply truncation at `max_history_output_chars` with exact DSPy marker string.
- Used in prompt for subsequent iterations and extraction fallback summary.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 5.5): create `RlmAdapter` module (feature-gated in dspy-rs).
Responsibilities: system prompt (DSPy parity), variable previews, output schema presentation, shape formatter usage, history formatting, and extraction prompt assembly.
Prefer composition over modifying `ChatAdapter`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 5 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- Prompt parity requirements captured and implemented in prompt generator.
- Preamble generator + output schema description hooked into prompts.
- BAML-style shape formatter works (depth=3, max_fields=20, cycles handled).
- REPL history formatter matches DSPy style.
- RlmAdapter module ties all prompt pieces together.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 6 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): integration + examples. Enable `rlm` feature on dspy-rs, create `RlmError` types, add example/trajectory analysis, and wire module exports in `lib.rs`.
Likely files: `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml` (features), `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/errors.rs`, `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/examples/*` or `examples/`, and `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs` for re-exports.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.6.5`.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 6.0): enable `rlm` feature in `crates/dspy-rs/Cargo.toml` (and rig-rlm if separate).
- `rlm` feature pulls in `rlm-core`, `rlm-derive`, `pyo3`, `baml-bridge/pyo3`.
- `lib.rs` re-exports `rlm_core` + `rlm_derive` under feature gate.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 6.1): define `RlmError` types (likely `src/error.rs` or `src/rlm/error.rs`).
Include variants for: LLM errors, Python runtime errors, assertion failures, conversion errors, max iterations, extraction failures. Should map to DSPy-style error strings where exposed.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 6.2): add example with trajectory analysis (likely in `examples/` or update `main.rs`).
Demonstrate `TypedRlm::<Sig>::with_agent(...)` + `.call(...)`, then print `RlmResult` fields (iterations, llm_calls, constraint summary) and trajectory history.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 6.3): wire module exports in `crates/dspy-rs/src/lib.rs` under `#[cfg(feature = "rlm")]`.
Re-export `TypedRlm`, `RlmConfig`, `RlmResult`, `RlmError`, `RlmAdapter` (if separate), and `rlm_core`/`rlm_derive` crates.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 6 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- `dspy-rs` `rlm` feature enabled; feature gates pyo3 + rlm crates.
- `RlmError` types defined and used by TypedRlm flow.
- Example with trajectory analysis compiles and runs.
- `lib.rs` exports `TypedRlm`, configs, errors, adapters as needed.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 7 plan (`dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`): testing & verification. Create integration test(s) and a verification checklist for RLM behavior (pyclass ergonomics, __baml__/__rlm_schema__ round‑trip, SUBMIT conversion, REPL history, Jupyter semantics).
Likely locations: `crates/dspy-rs/tests/typed_rlm_test.rs` or similar; ensure mock agent for execution where needed.
Acceptance criteria are in `dsrs-vn6.7.8` + `dsrs-vn6.7.7` manual checklist.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 7.1): create integration test (e.g., `crates/dspy-rs/tests/typed_rlm_test.rs`).
- Define `#[rlm_type]` Item and a Signature (e.g., SumItems) and ensure `TypedRlm::new/with_agent` compiles.
- Include smoke test for pyclass getters/`__repr__` if possible; mock agent for execution tests.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan (Task 7.2 in dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md): verification checklist for `#[rlm_type]` pyclass behavior.
Include: getters, repr template, iter/len/getitem if configured, __rlm_schema__ available, and `__baml__()` returns JSON-like dict.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan-derived test focus: `__baml__` round‑trip.
- For an `#[rlm_type]` struct, call `__baml__()` in Python and ensure it matches `BamlType::to_baml_value` shape.
- Round-trip via `BamlValue::try_from` or `try_from_baml_value` in Rust.
- Ensure nested structs/enums/Option/Vec behave (dict/list/None/primitive).
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan-derived test focus: SUBMIT conversion + DSPy error strings.
- Missing fields yields DSPy-style error: "Missing output fields" + `Use SUBMIT(...)` guidance.
- Type coercion failures return "[Type Error]" style message.
- Assert failures block completion when strict.
- Ensure __baml__ hook, dict/list/primitives, and jsonish string→type coercion paths are covered.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan-derived test focus: REPL history formatter.
- Ensure code fences stripped before execution and re-added for history.
- Truncation at `max_history_output_chars` uses DSPy marker string.
- History ordering: prompt + response blocks in sequence.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Plan-derived test focus: Jupyter semantics in REPL execution.
- stdout captured, last expression repr appended unless suppressed by trailing `;`.
- If no output: fallback message.
- Ensure truncation at `max_output_chars` and that prompt history truncation is separate.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Code pointers (as of 2026-01-27):
- Tests live under `crates/dspy-rs/tests/` (e.g., `test_input_format.rs`, `test_typed_templates.rs`, `test_signature_macro.rs`, `test_adapters.rs`).
- Prompt formatting logic: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/chat.rs` + default templates in `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/templates.rs`.
- Jinja value rendering: `crates/dspy-rs/src/adapter/jinja_types.rs`.
Checklist candidate: run `cargo test -p dspy-rs --tests`, then spot-check `ChatAdapter::format_*` output for typed signatures using the existing tests as baselines.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Manual checklist scope (Phase 7):
- `#[rlm_type]` pyclass: getters, repr, len/iter/getitem, __rlm_schema__.
- `__baml__` round-trip vs BamlType.
- SUBMIT error strings (missing fields, type errors, assert failures).
- REPL history formatting + Jupyter semantics + truncation behavior.
Use existing tests in `crates/dspy-rs/tests/` for baselines and add manual steps as needed.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local

note.content:
Phase 7 acceptance (per `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md`):
- Integration test(s) exist (e.g., `crates/dspy-rs/tests/typed_rlm_test.rs`) covering rlm_type + TypedRlm compile path.
- Tests for pyclass behavior, __baml__ round-trip, SUBMIT conversion, REPL history formatting, Jupyter semantics.
- Manual verification checklist (dsrs-vn6.7.7) completed with environment notes.
note.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
